name: Loyal Metals Ltd
analysis: LLM has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.4300. Trade idea: entry A$0.4300, stop A$0.4208, target A$0.4577 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
